_note: Starter set of authentic adhkar curated from Hisn al-Muslim (Fortress of the Muslim) and Sahih collections. Expand this file with verified content over time. All content should be reviewed by a qualified scholar before production release.

items.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illa Allahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
items.translation_en: We have entered the morning and the dominion belongs to Allah. Praise is to Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and the praise, and He is over all things capable.

items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu, wa ilaykan-nushur.
items.translation_en: O Allah, by You we enter the morning, and by You we enter the evening, and by You we live, and by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.

items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي، فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduk, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mas-tata't, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana't, abu'u laka bi ni'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bi dhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa ant.
items.translation_en: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no god but You. You created me and I am Your servant. I keep Your covenant and pledge as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil I have done. I acknowledge Your blessing upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me — for none forgives sins but You. (Sayyid al-Istighfar — the master of seeking forgiveness.)

items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ، وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
items.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i, wa huwas-Sami'ul-'Aleem.
items.translation_en: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in the heavens can cause harm. He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

items.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ، عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa, 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Adheem.
items.translation_en: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but Him. Upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.

items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
items.transliteration: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdih.
items.translation_en: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.

items.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illa Allahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
items.translation_en: We have entered the evening and the dominion belongs to Allah. Praise is to Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and the praise, and He is over all things capable.

items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna, wa bika asbahna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu, wa ilaykal-maseer.
items.translation_en: O Allah, by You we enter the evening, and by You we enter the morning, and by You we live, and by You we die, and to You is our return.

items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
items.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
items.translation_en: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ، وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
items.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i, wa huwas-Sami'ul-'Aleem.
items.translation_en: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in the heavens can cause harm. He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

items.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ، عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa, 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Adheem.
items.translation_en: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but Him. Upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.

items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
items.transliteration: Astaghfirullah.
items.translation_en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah.

items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma antas-Salam, wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-Jalali wal-Ikram.
items.translation_en: O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Owner of Majesty and Honor.

items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
items.transliteration: Subhan Allah.
items.translation_en: Glory is to Allah.

items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
items.transliteration: Alhamdulillah.
items.translation_en: Praise is to Allah.

items.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
items.transliteration: Allahu Akbar.
items.translation_en: Allah is the Greatest.

items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illa Allahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
items.translation_en: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and the praise, and He is over all things capable.

items.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
items.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
items.translation_en: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma qini 'adhabaka yawma tab'athu 'ibadak.
items.translation_en: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants.

items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
items.transliteration: Subhan Allah (33x), Alhamdulillah (33x), Allahu Akbar (34x).
items.translation_en: Glory is to Allah (33), praise is to Allah (33), Allah is the Greatest (34) — said before sleeping.

items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
items.transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur.
items.translation_en: Praise is to Allah, who has given us life after taking it from us, and to Him is the resurrection.

items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
items.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
items.translation_en: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wa a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wa a'udhu bika minal-jubni wal-bukhl, wa a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni wa qahrir-rijal.
items.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief; from incapacity and laziness; from cowardice and miserliness; and from being overwhelmed by debt and overpowered by men.

items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illa Allahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
items.translation_en: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and the praise, and He is over all things capable.

items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdih, Subhan Allahil-'Adheem.
items.translation_en: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him; glory is to Allah the Magnificent.

items.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
items.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
items.translation_en: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.
